title: ornithoboea flexuosa
intro: Ornithoboea flexuosa, also known as the Himalayan viper's bugloss or snake flower, is a flowering plant native to the Himalayas. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Ornithoboea flexuosa include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural remedy for digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ornithoboea flexuosa are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are typically consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
